_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in providing test and evaluation resource estimates
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Skill LS-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.542), RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.522).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.564). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. NICE-only terms [estimates, evaluation, providing, resource, test] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.896, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:50.0%, C:49.9%). No dominant classification for "Skill in providing test and evaluation resource estimates" vs "Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.561 ≈ STS 0.564 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. NICE-only: [estimates, evaluation, providing, resource, test]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic].
